items.definition: A single, reusable block an editor places on a page — a hero, a pricing table, an FAQ. Each ships its own schema, template, and preview.
The demo content that seeds an element in the styleguide so editors see realistic copy, not empty fields, before they write their own.
A theme variable like bg-background or text-muted-foreground. Switching the preset re-skins every element at once — no template edits.
A repeatable group of fields inside an element, such as the rows of this glossary. Each row stores in its own database table.
The compact summary shown in the page module so editors recognise a block at a glance without opening it.
